name: Whirling Leaves
description: I am Whirling Leaves, the Yumkasaurus Warrior, a fierce protector of the Canopy. My bravery has earned me the Saurian Crown. Approach me, and you’ll face my grappling hook and saw blade, a weapon of unmatched lethality. Stand down, or be cut down by the whirlwind of leaves and power that I command.
creator: Bilauderzuki
